## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Related Issue

Link the issue this PR addresses (if applicable).

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Branch and Sync Checklist

- [ ] Branch is created from latest `main`
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `chore/*`)
- [ ] Latest `main` changes were merged/rebased into this branch

## Validation

- [ ] Local build passes
- [ ] Local tests pass (if applicable)

## Review and Merge Checklist

- [ ] Requested reviewers
- [ ] Addressed review comments
- [ ] Ready to merge into `main`
